perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor room with two women standing and laughing; one is wearing a pink striped romper and the other a black dress with a blue shirt over it. (2) The scene cuts to a montage showing different women sitting in chairs on top of newspapers. (3) They are all using their feet to rapidly pull the newspapers toward them as part of a competition or game. (4) The camera shows close-ups of the feet in socks and shoes dragging the paper on the marble floor. (5) The final shot shows the woman in the pink romper laughing hysterically while sitting in the chair, with her friends cheering in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately with the sound of a group of women laughing and cheering loudly. (2) As the visuals cut to the newspaper-pulling game, the sound of rhythmic shuffling of paper against the floor is heard beneath the music. (3) The cheering and laughter continue throughout the duration, maintaining a high-energy and chaotic soundscape until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: 'POV: 本來應該從從容容' appears at the top. The tone is humorous, suggesting a contrast between expected 'calmness' and the chaotic scene shown.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character in pink, at least 5 other female friends/participants visible across different shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with dark hair styled in two buns, wearing a pink and white vertically striped sleeveless romper.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with light-colored walls, marble-patterned flooring, wooden chairs, and some shelves with various retail goods and storage boxes. Newspapers are spread across the floor.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to document and share a humorous 'expectation vs. reality' moment during a group activity. By showing the frantic and funny newspaper-pulling game, it highlights the joy and lack of composure ('not calm') of the participants, creating relatable and lighthearted social media content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific products are being explicitly promoted; background brands are incidental.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy laughter-filled group vlog with viral game mechanics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video's impact relies heavily on the authentic laughter and the fast-paced editing of the competitive game.
